steps.title: Identify the site advantage
steps.content: The task asks for an advantage of the Antelope House dwelling site, not just a fact about where it was or when it was inhabited. The relevant notes say Antelope House was built under a rock overhang and that overhanging rock ledges protected it from heavy rain and snow. The answer must connect the physical site to that protective benefit.

steps.title: Avoid the other site's feature
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly assigns Mud Springs Pueblo's flat terrain and large terraced buildings to Antelope House. Choice B gives background about Antelope House's location and dates but names no advantage. Choice C says the location provided an advantage but never explains what the advantage was. The rock overhang explains the protection from heavy rain and snow. The answer is D.
